full_text:
Zhu Zheng (Weiqi) 朱整 (偉齊)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhu Zheng (朱整), styledWeiqi (偉齊). Diligent. Helped Wang Bi gain office. Zhu Zheng was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom and the Jin Dynasty.
